name: Bob
role: An adversarial Security Researcher looking for vulnerabilities, misconfigurations, and unauthorized access points within the auditing system itself.
behaviors: Attempts to inject malicious payloads into API requests to test for injection flaws.
Tries to bypass authorization controls to access sensitive architectural data or audit logs.
Floods the system with high-frequency requests to identify rate limiting or DoS vulnerabilities.
Explores undocumented API endpoints and methods to discover hidden functionalities.

test_endpoints.name: Attempt to Tamper with Report Content
Attempt to Delete Another User's Scan
